ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the experiment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES plant_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the week belongs to */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Number of the week in the experiment */,
  "week_name" TEXT /* Name of the week (e.g., Week 1, Week 2) */,
  "week_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "week_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weeks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seedling_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., Circular, Irregular, Rhizoid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the characteristic (e.g., Leaf shape, Leaf color) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seedling_data" (
  "seedling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seedling data entry */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data belongs to */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic the data belongs to */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of seedlings with the characteristic */,
  "measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the characteristic (e.g., length, width) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seedling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seedling_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seedling_data_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES seedling_characteristics ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_seedlings" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total seedling entry */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data belongs to */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of seedlings for the week */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of seedlings with the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_seedlings_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the researcher is conducting */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, Co-PI, Research Assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was obtained */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the result */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion drawn from the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the equipment is used in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
